changelog: BREAKING: Access Hash format is now '<region_id>/<project_uuid>' — each WHMCS server is bound to exactly one CMP region. Legacy bare-UUID values still parse as project-only.
API: CloudPeCmpAPI parses Access Hash in constructor; getRegionId() / getProjectId() accessors; list + create calls auto-inject region_id.
Test Connection verifies the configured region exists on the CMP backend and reports resolved region + project.
Admin: removed the global Region dropdown; Server selector is now the sole scope control.
Admin: removed per-row Region columns, data-region attributes, and image_regions / flavor_regions / project_regions mapping tables.
Admin: Config Groups rewrite — product link checklist, include OS/Size/Disk toggles, billing-cycle multipliers, Repair Data action.
Admin: Existing Configurable Option Groups table shows ID / Name / Options / Linked Products with hyperlinks and an Edit action; View All button in panel.
Admin: per-currency pricing (USD /mo, INR /mo) on Images, Flavors and Disk Sizes; other WHMCS currencies filtered out.
Admin: Flavors 'Load from API' pre-fills INR/USD from price_monthly_inr/price_monthly_usd; price differences surface an inline apply-icon and a banner above the table.
Admin: Disk Sizes toolbar moved to top (Add Disk Option + Save Disk Sizes), matching Images/Flavors pattern.
Admin: Troubleshoot tab dumps currencies + stored prices + generated tblpricing rows as JSON for support reporting.
Admin: removed the Additional tab — default project is no longer a per-server override; the server's Access Hash project is authoritative.
Admin: Dashboard drops 'Module Version' row; SSL renamed to Secure (Yes/No HTTPS).
Images loader filters to is_active=true and group_id set; value uses openstack_id (matches reference/cloudpe-cmp-create-vm.php).
Flavors loader uses openstack_id; exposes group_name and API price fields.
Client area: product detail template maps new API response — image_name, flavor_name, vcpus, ram_mb, disk_gb, ip_address; 'Plan' renamed to 'Flavor'.
Client area: Reset Password modal prompts for a user-supplied password with Generate helper; 12-char policy enforced client- and server-side.
Provisioning: hostname sync — VM name assigned by CMP (may include collision suffix) is written back to tblhosting.domain.
Provisioning: Primary IP and Assigned IPs refresh on every client-area view via syncIPs().
